name: dots_vo3
text: This is Raki-Masu — Lucky-Mas. A Lucky Star meets Idolmaster desktop toy, sold on a single disc at Comiket, back in 2007.
prompt_text: Fufu~ welcome back, darling. Today we are breaking a game older than some of you, and I intend to enjoy every single second of it.

name: dots_vo4
text: The circle behind it was called SYGNAS. Out of print for years; their website, long gone. It almost vanished — which is exactly why we cracked it open.
prompt_text: Fufu~ welcome back, darling. Today we are breaking a game older than some of you, and I intend to enjoy every single second of it.

name: dots_vo9
text: And it paints its own mascot right over the top — masked the old-fashioned way: punch a hole, drop in the colour, copy it down.
prompt_text: Fufu~ welcome back, darling. Today we are breaking a game older than some of you, and I intend to enjoy every single second of it.

name: design_then_clone
text: And there it is — twenty lines of decompiled C, rebuilt from scratch. Fufu~, not bad at all.
prompt_text: Fufu~ welcome back, darling. Shall we break another little game today? I do hope you brought your patience.
